skill.name: maxhub-instagram
skill.description: Instagram platform data collection skill for users, posts, Reels, and Stories. Activates when users mention instagram, ins, image, reel, or story related needs.
skill.summary: Instagram data collection via MaxHub API for users, posts, Reels, and Stories
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: All 262 static scanner detections are false positives. The skill contains only markdown documentation and API reference materials. Backtick patterns flagged as shell commands are actually markdown code formatting. URL and API key references are legitimate service documentation. The skill is a read-only Instagram data collection tool that only accesses public data via HTTPS, uses environment variables for authentication, and explicitly disclaims any platform manipulation capabilities.

content.user_title: Collect Instagram Data for Users, Posts, Reels, and Stories
content.value_statement: Need to analyze Instagram content, track influencer metrics, or research social media trends? This skill provides read-only access to Instagram public data through the MaxHub API, enabling data-driven decisions without manual scraping.
actual_capabilities: Fetch Instagram user profiles by username or user ID
Retrieve user posts, Reels, stories, and highlights
Search for users, hashtags, locations, and music
Get post details including comments and likes lists
Fetch follower and following lists for accounts
limitations: Only accesses public data; private accounts require authentication
Read-only operations only; cannot post, like, or follow
Rate limits apply (60 calls per minute default)
API costs apply per call through MaxHub service

use_cases.title: Influencer Research and Analysis
use_cases.description: Research influencers by fetching their follower counts, post engagement rates, and content performance metrics to inform partnership decisions.

use_cases.title: Content Trend Discovery
use_cases.description: Search hashtags and trending topics to discover popular content patterns and emerging trends in specific niches or locations.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

use_cases.title: Competitive Intelligence
use_cases.description: Track competitor accounts by monitoring their posting frequency, engagement levels, and content strategy through regular data collection.

prompt_templates.title: Get User Profile
prompt_templates.prompt: Find information about the Instagram user {username} including their follower count, bio, and recent posts.
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need basic profile information for a specific Instagram account

prompt_templates.title: Search by Hashtag
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Instagram for posts tagged with {hashtag} and show me the top performing content and engagement metrics.
prompt_templates.scenario: When researching content trends or competitive hashtags

prompt_templates.title: Analyze Post Performance
prompt_templates.prompt: Get detailed information about this Instagram post: {url} including comment sentiment and like statistics.
prompt_templates.scenario: When evaluating specific content performance or conducting post-level analysis

prompt_templates.title: Batch Content Research
prompt_templates.prompt: Research multiple Instagram accounts ({usernames}) and create a comparison report showing their follower growth, engagement rates, and posting frequency.
prompt_templates.scenario: When comparing multiple influencers or competitors for strategic decisions

best_practices: Always check account balance before large batch operations to avoid unexpected costs
Use pagination limits (default 5 pages) to control data volume and API usage
Provide specific usernames or URLs when possible for faster, more accurate results
anti_patterns: Do not request data from private accounts; the API will return empty results
Avoid high-frequency polling; implement caching for repeated queries
Do not attempt automated engagement actions like auto-following or auto-liking

faq.question: Does this skill require an Instagram API key?
faq.answer: No, this skill uses the MaxHub API service instead of Instagram's direct API. You need a MaxHub API key registered at aconfig.cn.

faq.question: Can I post or interact through this skill?
faq.answer: No, this skill only reads public data. It cannot post, like, comment, or follow. All operations are read-only.

faq.question: What data can I access for private accounts?
faq.answer: Private accounts cannot be accessed through this skill. Only public Instagram data is available.

faq.question: Are there rate limits or costs?
faq.answer: Yes, MaxHub API applies rate limits (60 calls/minute default) and per-call pricing. The skill warns you when approaching limits.

faq.question: Does this skill store Instagram credentials?
faq.answer: No, the skill only uses the MaxHub API key stored in environment variables. It never accesses your Instagram account.

faq.question: What languages are supported?
faq.answer: The skill supports both English and Chinese queries. You can ask in either language.
